backend.changelog: Pre-Generate close-foreign-docs prompt now runs BEFORE attempting to open the BOM root assembly. Workstation Apply Update for CadBridge 1.8.53 strongly recommended -- BOM root no longer gets closed and reopened in the 3DPDF post-loop on Part-as-root or single-candidate Assembly-as-root BOMs.

cadBridge.changelog: Part-as-root-aware active-document setup in the Generate flow. The agent's BOM-root open/activate logic was assembly-only (.SLDASM + assembly document type at every step), so a Part-as-root BOM relied on the frontend's auto-open or the post-cleanup last-resort to leave the right document active. It now infers the root document type (part vs assembly) the same way the web app does and uses a robust open ladder -- activate-if-open, open-from-cache with the correct type, then open-by-platform-id (the reliable path on 3DX-Connector caches). No user-visible behavior change on assemblies; removes a fragile fallback on Part-as-root BOMs. Optional update -- workstations already on 1.8.53 are fine.
